title: Talks with US inching forward, says Greenland’s PM
summary_full: "The EU member countries have been a steadfast friend and have stood by us when we needed it the most," the Greenlandic leader said
summary_public: "The EU member countries have been a steadfast friend and have stood by us when we needed it the most," the Greenlandic leader said

GL.label: positive
GL.evidence: The EU member countries have been a steadfast friend and have stood by us
